metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
200m easy jog
10 worlds greatest stretch
20 sec HS Hold
10 air squats
10 plate I-Y-T
10 OH Walking lunges

hypertrophy.reasoning: Today prioritizes anterior chain and shoulders; target posterior chain and arms for balanced hypertrophy without interference.

raw_text:

siri_text: Saturday's workout. Metcon: Workout: 200m easy jog, 10 worlds greatest stretch, 10 air squats, 10 plate I-Y-T, 10 OH Walking lunges. For hypertrophy, focus on back, biceps, hamstrings.
